ddls:
CREATE TABLE "control_points" (
  "control_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control point */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Station ID of the control point */,
  "elevation_feet" REAL /* Elevation of the control point in feet */,
  "northing_feet" REAL /* Northing (Y) coordinate of the control point in feet */,
  "easting_feet" REAL /* Easting (X) coordinate of the control point in feet */,
  "pdf_diagram_link" TEXT /* Link to the PDF diagram for the control point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the control point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the control point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the control point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the control point was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the control point data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the control point (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the control point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure item */,
  "control_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control point associated with the infrastructure */,
  "infrastructure_type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure (e.g., road, utility, facility) */,
  "infrastructure_name" TEXT /* Name of the infrastructure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the infrastructure */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the infrastructure was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the infrastructure (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the infrastructure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the infrastructure record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the infrastructure data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the infrastructure */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "inspection_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next inspection is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_control_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_point_id") REFERENCES control_points ("control_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, surveyor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "control_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the control point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the control point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser and operating system) of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_control_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_point_id") REFERENCES control_points ("control_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the infrastructure being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to the inspection report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection record was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_infrastructure_id FOREIGN KEY ("infrastructure_id") REFERENCES infrastructure ("infrastructure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the inspector */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., civil engineering, geospatial surveying) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspector record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspector record was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the infrastructure being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance record was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_infrastructure_id FOREIGN KEY ("infrastructure_id") REFERENCES infrastructure ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
